summary: The protagonist visits Edchan, the chieftain of the Red Moru Clan, to have the Heavenly Realm Sword reforged using rare liquor as a gift. Impressed by the craftsmanship, the protagonist then travels to meet Johannes, the Lord of the Balter Mountains, to request the removal of a magical barrier. To earn this favor, the protagonist is tasked with conquering the highest peak and securing a non-aggression treaty from the Emperor, sparking the start of a new main scenario.
key_moments: Edchan successfully reforges the Heavenly Realm Sword, increasing its power and adding growth capabilities.
Johannes sets strict conditions for removing the barrier, requiring the protagonist to conquer a mountain and obtain a signed treaty from the Emperor.
The protagonist initiates a new quest for continental integration and communicates with an associate about streaming and guild recruitment.
